name: bench-mail
description: Multi-account Gmail MCP for the Bench crew. Tokens are scoped by Bench UID and stored in the same Firestore collection apps/web writes during the Settings → Integrations → Gmail (Bench Mail) connect flow. Every tool takes an explicit account_email — call list_accounts first to discover which inboxes are connected for the current Bench UID. v1 does NOT request gmail.send; drafts are saved to the user's Drafts folder for human approval (per Piper PRD).

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List every Gmail account connected to the current Bench UID. Call this BEFORE any other bench-mail tool to discover which account_email values are valid. Returns an array of { email, scopes, expiresAt, lastSyncAt, syncEnabled, syncError }.

tools.name: search_threads
tools.description: Search Gmail threads on a named account. Args: { account_email: string, query: string (Gmail query syntax), limit?: number (default 20, max 100) }.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Fetch the full message history of a Gmail thread. Args: { account_email: string, thread_id: string }.

tools.name: create_draft
tools.description: Create a Gmail draft on the named account. Saves to Drafts — never sends. Args: { account_email: string, to: string, subject: string, body: string, in_reply_to?: string (thread ID) }.

tools.name: list_labels
tools.description: List all Gmail labels (system + user) on the named account. Args: { account_email: string }.

tools.name: create_label
tools.description: Create a Gmail label, idempotent against existing names. Args: { account_email: string, name: string }.

tools.name: apply_label
tools.description: Apply an existing label to a thread. Args: { account_email: string, thread_id: string, label_id: string }.
